name: track-and-improve-headroom-ast

goal.end_state: Headroom AST compression keeps invalid syntax rejections at or below 10% on the representative corpus
constraints: do not weaken the syntax verifier
do not delete existing compression safety fallbacks
new corpus tests must fail if invalid syntax is emitted

iteration: load durable context and progress from disk
choose the single highest-impact open item
make the smallest change; on retry, change approach
run the verifier and write progress back to disk

verifier.check: corpus compression check exits 0 AND invalid_syntax_rejection_rate <= 0.10

stop_conditions.success: corpus compression check exits 0 AND invalid_syntax_rejection_rate <= 0.10

on_stop: summarize changes and open gaps; do not claim success unless the verifier passed
